name: Build Document Generator
description: Generates a PedalPCB-style build document PDF from the current board: cover page with board outline, parts list (BOM), and embedded schematic export.
description_full: Produces a multi-page PDF build document styled after PedalPCB project docs. Includes a cover page with the board outline (Edge.Cuts + silkscreen), a formatted parts list pulled from footprint attributes, and optionally the schematic exported via kicad-cli. Requires: reportlab, pypdf, svglib (optional, for board outline embedding).
